title: onosma azarbaidjanensis
intro: Onosma azarbaidjanensis, also known as Ajaran onosma, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and Azerbaijan. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its traditional use in folk medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma azarbaidjanensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin and respiratory infections. Onosma azarbaidjanensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential applications in pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries.
